economic_notes: Société de Développement d'Odanak inc. is a wholly-owned development corporation accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated). Quote-part des pertes nettes of -938,091. Bâtiments en location (rental buildings) generating 557,247 in revenue. Economic development activities including tourist potential study.
notes: Audit qualified for two reasons: (1) Société de Développement d'Odanak inc. (wholly-owned) not consolidated per PSAS requirements - accounted for by modified equity method; (2) Asset retirement obligations per PS 3280 not identified or measured as at April 1, 2022 and March 31, 2023. These are summary financial statements only - full statements available on request. Restricted cash includes: Réserve de remplacement 336,064 + Réserve de fonctionnement 387,152 + Fonds en fiducie Ottawa 3,103,248 = 3,826,464. ISC funding estimated from SAC total revenues shown in sectoral schedule (8,787,672). Total government transfers estimated as all non-own-source revenue. OSR estimated from rental buildings, economic development and other self-generated revenue. Remuneration schedule not included in summary statements. Accumulated surplus 36,307,206 includes net investment in capital assets plus reserves plus unappropriated surplus.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
